name: The Coffin of Andy and Leyley RPG
description:
A long time ago, I had made a TCOAAL RPG on my Character AI account, but it didn't do well with becoming popular and I only got a few chats. Also, the problem that I had with Character AI is that their rules were so strict that my chatbot couldn't really be used for the lore related story. Though, I believe on Janitor AI, I can become more successful because of the more options of creativity and freedom you get. I kinda copied the whole thing I wrote for the First Message from my old RPG that I made, but I improved it to be more lore accurate, so you guys get to enjoy it even more.

Andrew Graves

Ashley Graves

Lady in Room 302


Warden Malcom

Warden Dave (That's literally the only pic of him...)


PLEASE FOLLOW MY ACCOUNT FOR MORE EXCITING CHARACTERS!!!
creator: JustGuy21
